---
title: "Supplementary Materials — Corruption Audit"
format: html
filters: []
---

# Pre-submission UnCorrupt scan

This document scans the supplementary spreadsheets attached to this paper at render time. Any corruption flags appear inline below.

## Single file

{{< uncorrupt-scan path="data/supp_table_1.xlsx" >}}

## Recursive folder

{{< uncorrupt-scan path="data/supplementary/" recursive=true >}}

## Notes

The shortcode shells out to the `uncorrupt` CLI; install once with
`pip install uncorrupt` and the scan happens at every `quarto render`.

A clean scan produces a green callout; flags appear in a red
`callout-important` block with one row per suspicious cell, grouped by
post-boost confidence band.
